results_summary: Verifier re-applies mechanical rule strictly. Agrees overlap counts = 0 across all 5 results by strict substring. Verifier CONFIRMS the PASS verdict mechanically. HOWEVER verifier independently flags that substantively the candidate has dense prior art: 'Loss of Plasticity in Deep Continual Learning' (Nature 2024) is THE direct prior art; layer-normalization + weight decay intervention is from 2402.18762; the reverse-direction prediction is interesting but the LLM endpoint is published. So mechanical PASS but substantive FAIL. The cross-agent layer (program.md §9) catches this discrepancy.
